calendar.matters:
ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Ntc Of Hearing On Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-14-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Thomas J. LoSavio, Esq. of LOW, BALL & LYNCH 981-6630 in propria persona petitioning party

Mr. LoSavio represented in open court that he gave notice of intent to argue the tentative ruling. He provided copies of his moving papers and proof of service thereof to the Court. The Court having reviewed the documents and having heard from Mr. LoSavio GRANTED the petition to confirm arbitration award. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/sl) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
